title: Comedy Masters
desc: Talented comedians perform humorous acts and satirical sketches to entertain a special guest and make them burst with laughter.

title: Karunyam
desc: Gopi faces many challenges to run his middle-class family as he is the sole breadwinner. However, problems worsen when he loses his job.

title: Vakku Maruvakku
desc: The host interviews prominent politicians from different political parties in Kerala about their ideologies and the current situation in the country.

title: Ammayodoppam
desc: Mata Amrtanandamayi, a religious leader, delivers discourses and inspires devotees to follow a spiritually balanced and righteous life.

title: Ucha Vartha
desc: The host talks about some of the latest news stories about political, economic, social and cultural topics from all around the region.

title: Kadha Innuvare
desc: Four couples fight against all odds and difficulties to be with their true love, while their anthology showcases passionate struggles for romance.

title: Vanitha
desc: Vanitha, a police officer, realises the parallels between her professional and personal life. Later, she tries to solve cases in an attempt to ease her domestic issues as well.

title: Sandhya Deepam
desc: Religious leaders and scholars deliver a discourse on various aspects of Kerala's rich cultural heritage and spiritual observances.

title: The Lion
desc: An education minister's family, steeped in politics and corruption, faces internal strife as his honest son fights for justice.
